institute.name: LIB Education
institute.description: LIB Education is a premier coaching institute dedicated to providing quality education through innovative teaching methods and personalized attention. We believe in nurturing young minds and helping them achieve their full potential.
institute.mission: To provide world-class education that empowers students to excel academically and develop critical thinking skills for lifelong success.
institute.vision: To be the most trusted and preferred educational institution, creating future leaders and innovators.
institute.methodology: Our teaching methodology combines traditional wisdom with modern educational technology. We focus on concept clarity, regular assessments, and personalized attention to ensure every student achieves their goals.

courses.title: Mathematics
courses.description: Master mathematical concepts from basics to advanced levels. Our structured curriculum covers algebra, geometry, calculus, and more with practical problem-solving techniques.

courses.title: Science
courses.description: Explore the wonders of Physics, Chemistry, and Biology through interactive learning. We make science fun with experiments and real-world applications.

courses.title: English
courses.description: Develop strong communication skills with our comprehensive English program covering grammar, literature, writing, and spoken English.

courses.title: Kannada
courses.description: Learn Karnataka's beautiful language with focus on reading, writing, and literature. Perfect for students preparing for board exams.

courses.title: Hindi
courses.description: Master Hindi language skills through comprehensive lessons in grammar, literature, and composition. Ideal for all proficiency levels.

courses.title: Sanskrit
courses.description: Discover the ancient language of Sanskrit with expert guidance in grammar, slokas, and classical texts.

courses.title: French
courses.description: Learn French language with interactive sessions covering conversation, grammar, and French culture. DELF exam preparation available.

features.title: Personalized Learning
features.description: Individual attention and customized study plans for each student

features.title: Regular Assessments
features.description: Weekly tests and monthly evaluations to track progress

features.title: Hybrid Classes
features.description: Flexible online and offline class options for your convenience

features.title: Parent Updates
features.description: Regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings

features.title: Expert Teachers
features.description: Highly qualified and experienced faculty with proven results

features.title: Study Materials
features.description: Comprehensive notes, worksheets, and practice materials
